description:
Pro photography, in your pocket.

TesserCam is an AI-native camera for the photos you want to keep. Start with the camera, not a filter: capture a new moment or choose a photo you already love, then shape it into a more considered final image.

Bring out the details that make a photo feel finished: natural background depth, a cleaner frame, a more flattering portrait, and a balanced composition. Choose Auto for a simple starting point, or use Manual to guide the look yourself.

FEATURES
- Capture a photo or choose one from your library
- Refine portraits, reduce distractions, reshape composition, and add natural background blur
- Compare the original and finished photo in your Gallery
- Save finished photos to your library and mark favourites
- Keep shooting while a photo is processing, then get notified when it is ready
- Manage credit packs and restore purchases securely through the App Store

TesserCam only processes photos you choose. Credits are used when you choose to enhance a photo.

Privacy Policy: https://tessercam.flyingfish.cc/privacy-policy.html
Terms of Use: https://tessercam.flyingfish.cc/terms-of-use.html
promotionalText: Your pocket camera for portraits with natural depth, balanced composition, and a refined finish.
